nodes.name: Send SMS (Twilio)
nodes.notes: Requires Twilio credentials in n8n and TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER env var.

nodes.name: Send email (Resend)
nodes.notes: Configure with Resend SMTP credentials. From address must be a verified Resend domain.

meta.description:
Sends SMS and/or email appointment confirmation immediately after Ava books a call.

Required n8n credentials:
  Twilio — for SMS (add TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER as env var)
  Resend / SMTP — for email

ElevenLabs agent must extract these fields into custom_analysis_data for full personalisation:
  patientFirstName, patientLastName, patientPhone (Ava-confirmed full number),
  patientEmail, appointmentDate, appointmentTime, clinicianName, appointmentType
Without these, messages will be generic but still send.
